title: What time do officials reviews start to come out
display_title: What time do officials reviews start to come out
wikitext:
[]: What time do officials reviews start to come out?             Quote Post by FryMeTuhDehMuhn » Sun Mar 07, 2021 4:54 pm It's March 8 in Japan, and still no reviews, so they must be coming out at some point really soon. Any ideas of when? Thanks!

[]: Re: What time do officials reviews start to come out?             Quote Post by melonpan » Sun Mar 07, 2021 4:55 pm The first screenings are just about to start in 5 minutes I believe

[]: Re: What time do officials reviews start to come out?             Quote Post by amitakartok » Sun Mar 07, 2021 4:56 pm Dude, the movie is about to start screening. Literally nobody outside Khara had seen it yet.

[]: Re: What time do officials reviews start to come out?             Quote Post by JuanSorel » Sun Mar 07, 2021 5:00 pm amitakartok wrote: Dude, the movie is about to start screening. Literally nobody outside Khara had seen it yet.

[]: Re: What time do officials reviews start to come out?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 07, 2021 5:03 pm JuanSorel wrote: Is this a special case

[]: Re: What time do officials reviews start to come out?             Quote Post by JuanSorel » Sun Mar 07, 2021 5:10 pm Mr. Tines wrote: JuanSorel#912519 wrote: Is this a special case

[]: Re: What time do officials reviews start to come out?             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Sun Mar 07, 2021 5:12 pm JuanSorel wrote: amitakartok#912511 wrote: Dude, the movie is about to start screening. Literally nobody outside Khara had seen it yet.

[]: Re: What time do officials reviews start to come out?             Quote Post by JuanSorel » Sun Mar 07, 2021 5:24 pm Thesufferingpumpkin wrote: JuanSorel#912519 wrote: Are there no press screening in Japan? No screeners? The point of reviews is to get people to know how a movie is before it opens, not after. Is this a special case beacuse of the pandemic or is Khara usually reviewers shy? Genuinely curious.
